title: Crouton Builder — Graduation Plan
subtitle: POC (crouton-builder-demo) → crouton-layout package + builder app
intro: The plan is DERIVED from the frozen 26-entry spec ledger — every card below is a real spec entry, so the plan can't drift from the contract. Read top to bottom: Contract (done) → Rebuild the app to satisfy the spec → prove it two ways (experience + conformance). Statuses are updated as increments land; re-render with `node scripts/graduation-plan.mjs crouton-builder`.

phases.name: Contract
phases.summary: Freeze the spec ledger as the authoritative contract. Every downstream gate compares against it — not against the agent's memory of the POC.
phases.worksNow: The 26-entry spec is frozen (15 Preserve / 4 Replace / 7 Add). A1 contradictions resolved, A2 Replace-table agreed. All three A-gates signed off.

steps.name: A0 · Freeze spec ledger
steps.test: spec.json has 26 entries; every `settled` entry carries a recorded `signedOff`.

steps.name: A1 · Resolve contradictions
steps.test: No entry contradicts another; superseded entries pruned.

steps.name: A2 · Replace-table (POC fakes → real crouton)
steps.test: Each `stopgap` entry names the real crouton thing that replaces it at graduation.

phases.name: Rebuild the app to satisfy the spec
phases.summary: Build `pocs/crouton-builder` on crouton-layout primitives so it satisfies the frozen spec — Preserve verbatim, Replace per A2, Add through their own gates. A POC is a floor, not a ceiling: the app is a superset.

increments.name: Spine
increments.note: The skeleton the rest hangs off. Built on the crouton-layout package, not a port of POC code.
increments.worksNow: A two-level Site flow (pages as a wireable graph) opens a per-page board over REAL crouton collections (artists / bookings / pages). Board edits persist to the collection and serialise to a clean, diffable LayoutTree. All 5 data-handoff hooks are present in the DOM.

increments.name: Canvas & gestures
increments.note: Rebuild the board on the POC's Vue Flow (CroutonFlow) canvas — this is where the 11 Preserve gestures live. Staggered on purpose: C1 can start walking each behaviour the moment it lands, instead of a big-bang at the end. drag-glow / add-block-land / spacer-block are independent and can land in parallel.
increments.worksNow: The board becomes a candidate canvas: many layout candidates + loose drafts as nodes, with the proven drag / snap-dwell / pinch-zoom / detach gestures.

increments.name: Additions (the app's superset)
increments.note: Independent of each other — parallelisable once the canvas is stable. Each is a NEW behaviour the POC left open, so each goes through its own gate (schema / UI / test-first), NOT the side-by-side comparison.
increments.worksNow: Region pinning, bounded display variants, depth-recursive detach, and the round-trip-onto-ticket seat (#974) — completeness the POC only gestured at.

increments.name: Deferred — the agent⇄human seat
increments.note: The AI + collab seat (#974). Not required for graduation; it's WHY the clean contract matters, built once the contract is real.

phases.name: Prove it — experience side-by-side
phases.summary: Walk each Preserve (`settled`) entry on the POC and the app together — same hook, same gesture, same result. This is the first of graduation's TWO acceptance axes.
phases.worksNow: Every settled behaviour behaves identically on POC and app; each signed off (lgtm per entry). Staggered: begins per-item as each B2 gesture lands.
phases.gate: C1 signed off — a recorded lgtm per Preserve entry (done is derived from the sign-off, never a green build).

phases.name: Prove it — crouton-conformance
phases.summary: Run `/conformance` — the second acceptance axis. Certifies the app is a REAL crouton app: CLI-scaffolded (server/db/schema.ts present), real collections not stub blocks, consumes crouton-layout without reinventing it (DRY).
phases.worksNow: A signed-off conformance checklist on the graduation PR, composing /frontend-review + /a11y + /e2e-smoke + pnpm typecheck plus the crouton-structural checks.
phases.gate: C2 checklist signed off. Graduation promotes ONLY when both C1 and C2 are signed off.
